changes_made: Rewrote skill from Chinese to English for better qwen3.5-397b comprehension
Added critical rule to always use relative paths when writing output files (model was using absolute paths outside workspace, causing sync failures)
Replaced generic shell command examples with complete Python scripts for batch rename and directory analysis tasks
Added explicit depth calculation comments with worked examples to prevent model from incorrectly 'fixing' the +2 offset to +1
Emphasized writing JSON via Python scripts (json.dump) rather than shell string assembly
Removed verbose Chinese-language reference sections (tool installation, safety warnings) that consumed context without improving task performance
